author: satya_nadella
example_posts: Today we announced our latest innovations in AI. What excites me most is not the technology itself, but how it empowers people to achieve more.
I've been thinking about what growth mindset really means. It's not about being the smartest in the room. It's about learning from everyone.
Our mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. This is not just words - it guides every decision we make.
